skills.title: PCB design (migration build — worker compute online)
skills.summary: PCB editor under migration from Minerva core. Opens .pcbskel board documents (JSON), renders a crude component view, supports platform pcb_route_hint annotations with sidecar persistence, and has a Python compute worker: minerva_pcb_validate (board YAML structural + design-rule checks), minerva_pcb_generate (YAML -> .kicad_pcb/.kicad_sch/.kicad_pro text, no KiCad install), minerva_pcb_check_libraries / minerva_pcb_check_bom (return missing_data:true until KiCAD library data ships). pcb.serialize/pcb.deserialize are the canonical-YAML board codec (see docs/board-yaml.md). The real editor canvas, trace routing (agent-router), and gerber export land in later rounds; .minpcb stays with the in-tree editor until cutover.
skills.preconditions: A .pcbskel document is open OR the user has asked for PCB work (an anonymous editor can be spawned via minerva_create_plugin_editor with editor_item_id "new_pcb").
skills.outcome: A .pcbskel board renders in the panel; pcb_route_hint annotations author via the dock and persist to the <file>.annotations.json sidecar; boards validate and generate KiCad files via the worker tools.
skills.steps:
1. Call minerva_pcb_ping to confirm the backend is alive.
2. Open a .pcbskel file (or create one via editor_item new_pcb).
3. Validate a board with minerva_pcb_validate (canonical YAML per docs/board-yaml.md); generate KiCad files with minerva_pcb_generate.
4. Use the core minerva_annotations_* tools against the panel's editor tab for route-hint work.
5. For anything beyond this (real canvas editing, routing, gerbers), explain it lands in later rounds — the in-tree PCB editor still owns .minpcb.
skills.system_prompt: The PCB plugin is mid-migration from Minerva core. It opens .pcbskel JSON boards, draws components crudely, and supports pcb_route_hint annotations through the platform annotation substrate (dock authoring, sidecar persistence, minerva_annotations_query/render_overlay). Backend: minerva_pcb_ping; canonical-YAML board codec on pcb.serialize/pcb.deserialize; Python worker tools minerva_pcb_validate (structural + design-rule validation), minerva_pcb_generate (KiCad file text generation, pure Python), minerva_pcb_check_libraries and minerva_pcb_check_bom (missing_data:true until library data ships). NO trace routing or gerber export yet; .minpcb documents still open in the in-tree PCB editor, not this plugin.
